examples: It suggests that rare-earth elements yttrium and praseodymium have certain genotoxicity.
Praseodymium reacts with mineralizer, and is transported in vapor state to the reaction site of zircon.
Nickel-metal-hydride batteries use neodymium, cerium, lanthanum and praseodymium, none of which are used in more efficient lithium-ion batteries.
Praseodymium and Scandium are used for aircraft engines.
